caption: An older man with white hair and a white beard, wearing a white sleeveless jacket over a light-colored long-sleeved shirt, stands behind a wooden podium. He is speaking and gesturing with both hands held up in front of his chest. The podium is equipped with two gooseneck microphones positioned in front of him. He is set against a backdrop of green marble walls featuring a geometric, interlocking pattern. To his right, a decorative golden pillar is partially visible, adorned with small pink flowers. As the scene progresses, the man continues his speech, with subtle changes in his facial expressions and the positioning of his hands, while the camera remains stationary. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the frames.
